records.ety: [NL., fr. Gr. <?/, fr. <?/ to be or become full. Cf. Pleonasm.]

defs: Overfullness; especially, excessive fullness of the blood vessels; repletion; that state of the blood vessels or of the system when the blood exceeds a healthy standard in quantity; hyperæmia; -- opposed to anæmia.
State of being overfull; excess; superabundance.
quotes: He labors under a plethora of wit and imagination.
